text.message: We played at 6:20 AM PST this morning.
fwiw, blue, I had 0 cards when red robbed you last round
im afraid i messed up with this setup :(
blue i will trade u wheat all day, we can be friends :)
Blue i wouldnt have even stolen from u but it was the only shared bloc i had
Ah so u dont know how to play
Let's all chill for a minute
dang this 8 block just kills me
ive gotten 3 cards all game lol
U have a city and road mate
those are literally the only cards ive rolled
started with 60% of a city in hand lol
your setup is elite red, sorry gotta hit you
I will, it's kind of early to worry about road
otherwise its looking like a double play
blue we need u to take road
looks like its reds to keep
blue u need wheat at all?
Ik its hard to believe but
maybe we did need u to pop
red on 8 mono knight now probs?
not bad u can still settle
Thought there was a lot more wheat
